prerequisites: A Mailjet account with access to the SMS Dashboard at https://app.mailjet.com/sms.
Funds in your Mailjet SMS Wallet; sending SMS requires credits, with a minimum deposit of 1 unit in USD, EUR, or GBP. Allow up to 48 hours after depositing for the wallet to be activated.
A generated SMS API Bearer token (the `token` config field). The token is shown only once at creation, so save it before closing the dialog.

authMethods.name: Bearer token
authMethods.summary: Mailjet SMS API requests authenticate with a Bearer token, supplied through the connector's required `token` secret field. The value is sent in the request Authorization header as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. This is a different method from the one used for Mailjet's email API.

setupSteps.title: Fund your SMS Wallet
setupSteps.body: Sending SMS through Mailjet requires available credits. In the Mailjet app, open the SMS subscription page (https://app.mailjet.com/sms/subscription) and deposit funds. Accepted currencies are USD, EUR, and GBP, with a minimum deposit of 1 unit. There is a 48-hour verification waiting period before the wallet is activated.

setupSteps.title: Generate an SMS API token
setupSteps.body: Go to the Mailjet SMS Dashboard (https://app.mailjet.com/sms) and click 'Generate a token'. The token is displayed only once, so copy and store it before closing the modal.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated Bearer token in the required `token` field. The connector uses it to authenticate against the Mailjet SMS API (endpoints under https://api.mailjet.com/v4/).

setupSteps.title: Set the optional replication window
setupSteps.body: Optionally set `start_date` and `end_date` to bound the time range of records the connector pulls. Both fields are optional; leave them empty to use the connector's defaults.

sources.title: Mailjet SMS API - Getting Started (prerequisites, wallet, Bearer token)
